abstract.text: A Swift-first Discord API wrapper that feels like it was written for you, not by a spec sheet.

inlineContent.text: SwiftDisc brings together the full Discord REST API, Gateway events, typed models, and high-level bot-building tools — all built on Swift 6.2’s async/await and actor-safe concurrency from day one.
